definition: measurement detects a real signal; control reliably acts on it
preferred_usage: source-side measurements are real but not reliable controls
forbidden_usage: do not equate measurement with actionability

definition: a ceiling uses diagnostic target information; an action rule is available at selection time
preferred_usage: conditioned ceilings are diagnostic upper envelopes

definition: rank is weak within-target ordering; gauge is target-specific offset/scale/localization
forbidden_usage: do not pool rank and gauge as one scalar or theorem

definition: source-only, target-unlabeled, and target-label-derived information are separate availability classes
forbidden_usage: do not call target-unlabeled or target-label diagnostics source-only

definition: keys partition cells; label content evaluates candidates
preferred_usage: key-only remains separate from label-derived diagnostics
forbidden_usage: do not say target/trajectory keys close the residual

definition: templates transfer partially; endpoint scalar reads held-out candidate endpoint
preferred_usage: template-only is partial and endpoint-scalar availability is diagnostic
forbidden_usage: do not claim template-only equals 0.944 closure

definition: same-label oracle reuses evaluated endpoint; split-label calibration needs disjoint labels
preferred_usage: same-label oracle is diagnostic and split-label calibration is future work
